g.text: HNSW Index Serialization Format (Binary V1.0 Layout)

ul.li: All numeric fields MUST be encoded in Little Endian format.
Floating point values (mult) use standard IEEE 754 64-bit precision.
Offset 0x08 (Version) MUST be >= 1 for this layout.
Data structures should be aligned to 64-byte cache line boundaries.
This binary format is compatible with mmap(2) on Unix systems for zero-copy deserialization.
